chapter_title.en: The Chapter of Condolences and Grief During Calamities, Visiting Graves, Lamentation and Mourning Gatherings

parts.text: 525 - وَ كَانَ عَلِيُّ بْنُ اَلْحُسَيْنِ عَلَيْهِمَا اَلسَّلاَمُ إِذَا رَأَى جَنَازَةً قَالَ

text: « اَلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ اَلَّذِي لَمْ يَجْعَلْنِي مِنَ اَلسَّوَادِ اَلْمُخْتَرَمِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.525 - When Imam Ali ibn Al-Hussain (as), saw a funeral procession, He would say:
Alhamdulillahi alladhi lam yaj‘alni mina as-sawadi al-mukhtaram
'Praise be to Allah (swt) who did not make me from among those whose lives were abruptly taken'".
